name: Blurry Vision
statement:
v>
Please direct your vision to line number $x$.
Now, read the word you see on that line.
If you struggle, I might have to prescribe eyeglasses.
input: The only line contains one integer $x$ ($1 \leq x \leq 11$) — the line number.
output: Output the word on line number $x$.
note: If you fail to read the first line, even glasses won't save you.
